case_title: JOHN DAVID CLARK VS. RENEE LAROSE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, JOHN DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LAROSE, RENEE DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-08-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-16-2020
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100102093)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-08-2020 CONTINUED TO MAY-20-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-20-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
